---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# **Đồ thị cột** 

Từ khóa: barchart, bar chart, barplot, đồ thị cột, đồ thị thanh

## **Câu 1**

**Tạo 1 chuỗi số từ 5 đến 50 cách nhau 5 số**


<!-- <style> -->
<!-- div.blue pre { background-color:#fff2cc; font-size: 22px; } -->
<!-- </style> -->

<!-- <div class = "blue"> -->

```{r}

```


```{r, echo = T}
df_kq <- readRDS("dataset/bar1.rds")

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(data = df_kq,
       mapping = aes(x = semester,
                     y = mean_score,
                     fill = gender)) +
  
  geom_col(position = "dodge",
           width = 0.8,
           color = "black") +
  
  # geom_boxplot() +
  
  geom_point(data = df_kq,
             mapping = aes(x = semester,
                           y = max_score,
                           color = gender,
                           fill = gender,
                           group = gender),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(50,100)) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping = aes(ymin = mean_score,
                              ymax = mean_score + sd_score),
                width=0.8,
                colour="black",
                position = "dodge",
                alpha=1,
                size=0.5) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(40,100))

```

<!-- </div> -->

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Đáp án"}

<style>
div.yes123 pre { background-color:#fff2cc; font-size: 16px; }
div.yes123 pre.r { background-color:#F1F3F5; font-size: 16px; }
</style>
<div class = "yes123">
```{r}
a <- seq(from = 5,
         to = 50,
         by = 5)
cat(a)
```
</div>

:::
